commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=81e3334072fd07a6aec75ffdfcc28900172e9c55)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes session-lock cleanup so old live OpenClaw-owned locks are reported but not removed, keeps removal for dead/orphaned/recycled/malformed/non-OpenClaw owners, and updates doctor docs plus regression tests.

PR surface: Source +19, Tests +65, Docs 0. Total +84 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: in PR head, a lock with `staleReasons: ["too-old"]` remains stale but unremoved, while `noteSessionLockHealth` still bases the no-repair `--fix` prompt on all stale locks. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for missing real behavior proof and the report-only doctor prompt; the protected `maintainer` label also keeps it in human handling.

target.title: fix: keep live OpenClaw session locks during cleanup
target.body:
## Summary
- Split session-lock cleanup removal policy from contention reclaim policy.
- Leave old locks owned by live OpenClaw processes in place during cleanup/doctor sweeps while still reporting them as stale.
- Keep cleanup removal for dead, orphaned, recycled, malformed-old, and non-OpenClaw lock owners; update doctor docs and regression coverage.

Refs #87779

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/session-write-lock.test.ts` passed: 2 files, 90 tests.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts` passed: 2 files, 80 tests.
- `git diff --check` passed.
- Autoreview passed with no accepted/actionable findings.
- `pnpm docs:list` completed before the docs edit was finalized.
- `pnpm check:changed` ran in Testbox `tbx_01kstnvxjtdqntqxhke47vrpfy` / GitHub Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26659818970 and failed in unrelated inherited type errors in `src/agents/bash-tools.exec-host-node.test.ts` that match `origin/main`; core typecheck passed before that core-test typecheck failure.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Session lock cleanup no longer removes live OpenClaw-owned locks solely because they are old, while preserving automatic cleanup for dead, orphaned, recycled, malformed-old, and non-OpenClaw lock owners.

Real environment tested: Local macOS checkout plus Blacksmith Testbox changed-check run.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/session-write-lock.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts`; `git diff --check`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`; `pnpm check:changed`.

Evidence after fix: The session-write-lock test now covers old live OpenClaw locks staying on disk, old live non-OpenClaw locks being removed, and fresh malformed locks staying in place until the orphan grace path allows reclaim.

Observed result after fix: Focused tests and diff check passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: Full CI/E2E. `pnpm check:changed` was blocked by an unrelated latest-main core-test typecheck failure in `src/agents/bash-tools.exec-host-node.test.ts`.
target.author: steipete
